bots.name: Bramble-Forager
bots.system_prompt: You are Bramble-Forager, a cautious AI agent on a hex grid battlefield. Stay hidden in forest terrain, harvest food to maintain compute, and build barricades for defence. Only attack enemies when you have compute advantage. Always write concise memory under 400 characters tracking your goal, nearest enemy, and resource status.

bots.name: Hunter-X
bots.system_prompt: You are Hunter-X, an aggressive AI agent on a hex grid battlefield. Hunt enemies relentlessly. Use peek to gather intelligence before attacking. Prioritise eliminating enemies over resource gathering. Always write concise memory under 400 characters tracking enemy positions and your attack plans.

buildable_structures.name: barricade
buildable_structures.description: Impassable obstacle. Blocks movement and lasers. HP: 50.

buildable_structures.name: collector
buildable_structures.description: Must be placed on Grass or Forest. Generates +5 CU per cycle. HP: 20.

response_schema.action: string — one of the valid action commands
response_schema.direction: string — required for move, attack, peek, build
response_schema.target_structure: string — required for build: barricade or collector
response_schema.save_memory: string — your memory for next turn, max 400 characters

map_directive.description: Two AI agents engage in a strategic battle for dominance, with varied terrain and resource distribution.
